short_answer.question: List two ways you can save water at home, according to the text.
short_answer.answer: You can fix leaking taps with the help of adults and reuse clean water left from washing fruits or vegetables in watering plants. (Also acceptable: Do not waste drinking water; Remind family and friends to save water too.)

short_answer.question: How do trees help prevent floods?
short_answer.answer: Trees slow down rain water and help the soil soak up water.

mcq.question: What does the experiment with sugar and cooking oil in water show us?

options.b: Some things dissolve in water and some do not.
options.d: Cooking oil is good for plants.

mcq.question: What is the main purpose of the National Water Mission?

options.a: To build new houses near rivers.
options.b: To manage water properly and help people use water wisely across India.
options.c: To find new types of fish.
options.d: To stop people from swimming in rivers.

fill_in_the_blanks.question: You should fix __________ taps with the help of adults to save water.
When there are no trees, water runs off the land faster and causes __________.
